notes: Repair-focused retrieval eval, hand-built from the source PDF, method-neutral. Questions target how-to-perform-repair content: gold_pages are the verified page span of the procedure (start page located via the manual's 'X > Y > Repair procedures' breadcrumbs, sub-spans confirmed via Removal/Installation/Replacement headings and spot-reads). Since procedures span pages, recall@k matters most here: MiniCPM must see the WHOLE span to reproduce every step. expected_values are substrings a correct answer should contain (phase-2 answer scoring; unused by retrieval eval). Categories: repair (component removal/installation/replacement, manual terminology), fluids (drain/refill/bleed), inspect-adjust (measurements and adjustments within repairs), torque (a tightening value needed mid-repair), paraphrase (everyday DIY phrasing of repair asks).
